---
#title: "Deep Policy Lab"
css: /custom.css
#image: files/logo.jpeg
#page-layout: full

#listing:
#  - id: featured-projects
#    contents: /projects
#    type: grid
#    max-items: 3
#    page-size: 0 #set as 0 will remove the page setting
#    sort: 
#      - "date desc"
#      - "title asc"
---




<p align="center" style="font-size:48px;">We use data-drive, evidence-base approach to study energy and climate policy and offer policy insights for energy decisions and climate actions to achieve carbon neutrality.</p>

<center>
::: {.hero-buttons}
[Learn more](about.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button"}
::: 
</center>
<!--
:::{#featured-projects}
:::
-->
